title: BUYGER Pretend Play Kitchen Food Set Toys for 3 4 5+ Years Olds, Plastic Hamburger Fast Food Kids Kitchen Accessories with Tray for Kids Boys Girls
features: 【Play Kitchen Food Toy Accessories】- Full toy food set bring children a delightful fast food restaurant experience. Includes hamburger, hot dog, sandwich burger, 2 waffles, 2 drinks, 1 french fries, 1 ketchup, knife, fork, spoon and a tray for storing and transporting food.

【Realistic Play Food Sets for Kids Kitchen】 - Design based on real food, such as a toasted sesame bread, a grill-marked beef patty and fresh lettuce, tomato, and onion. The vegetables and meat layers have clear textures and colors, allowing children to better classify and assemble them. DIY a unique burger with the kids.

【High Quality Plastic Pretend Food Toys】 - The hamburger toy not only looks good, but also made of high-quality, safe materials and easy clean. Rounded edges and burr-free are safe for kids. Suitable size for small hands to grip.

【Funny Pretend Role Play Toys】 - Role play as a little chef, restaurant owner or waiter, learn how to order, make, sell and pack fast food, it brings the authentic restaurant experience to life. Our realistic hamburger toy is the ultimate prop for imaginative role-play. Enjoy hours of fun!

【Educational Toys】 - Specially made for children over 3 years old. Different textures of food toys can stimulate children's sense of touch. Disassembling and assembling can exercise children's fine motor skills. Complete kitchen accessories allow children to improve communication and imagination during role play, which is an ideal educational toy for toddlers.
【Ideal Gift for Kids】 - Still searching for the Christmas gift for a 3 4 5+ year old? Our fast food toy are ready! An ideal role-playing toy for grandchildren, kids, boys and girls.
